title: Item & Subitem Status Updates
excerpt: I see there was a an automation to change an item status to something like Done if all sub items are marked Done. Is there a way to create an automation to do the opposite? If I mark the item Done, I want it to make the …

posts.author: ScottL (Scott Levy)
posts.cookedHtml: I see there was a an automation to change an item status to something like Done if all sub items are marked Done. Is there a way to create an automation to do the opposite? If I mark the item Done, I want it to make the subitems Done.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ScottL

We developed an app that solves this exact pain point of subitems inherting column value from parent. It’s called Subitem Automations and it allows to do this on subitem creation and when the parent item changes, here’s an example -

Screenshot 2024-01-16 at 19.42.452126×396 27.3 KB

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Hope that helps!

posts.author: workflowboost (Bartosz @ Workflow Boost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

You can do that easily with our Subitems Pro Automations app. It introduces the automation for copying item column value to a selected column in all subitems:

image335×260 8.37 KB

If you have any questions or requests for custom automations, feel free to reach out to us!
